title: diplotaxis assurgens subsp. assurgens
intro: Diplotaxis assurgens subsp. assurgens, also known as the Iberian rocket or Iberian wall rocket, is a biennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Diplotaxis assurgens subsp. assurgens can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
